data.title: Smart Money Is Betting Big In PLTR Options
Argenx's Flagship Drug Vyvgart Shows Sustained Disease Control In Rare Neuromuscular Disease Patients
data.description: Argenx reports long-term Vyvgart data showing lasting efficacy in gMG and CIDP, with strong safety and symptom control across multiple studies.

data.title: Cartesian Therapeutics Reports Strong 12-Month Data For Lead Cell Therapy In Myasthenia Gravis Patients
data.description: Cartesian reports 12-month data for Descartes-08 in myasthenia gravis; Phase 3 AURORA trial expected to begin in Q2 2025.

data.title: Bitwise Turns Crypto Volatility Into Yield With New ETF Trio
data.description: Bitwise Asset Management introduces 3 new ETFs targeting option income strategies from volatile stocks in the crypto market. Active management by experienced team to capture income and equity gains.

data.title: Tariffs Test Loeb's Financial Picks: Third Point Adjusts Bets As Markets Brace For Economic Blowback
data.description: Shares of companies within the broader financials sector are trading lower as markets reacted to Trump's sweeping tariff announcement.
